MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-left fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;--fontSize:26;line-height:1.6;"><a class="awb-custom-text-color awb-custom-text-hover-color"
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="wt-cli-element wt-cli-element cli-plugin-main-link" href="https://oslospektrum.no/personvern" id="wt-cli-policy-link" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:600;
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.cookieyes.com/" target="_blank"><img alt="CookieYes Logo" src="https://oslospektrum.no/wp-content/plugins/webtoffee-gdpr-cookie-consent/public/images/logo-cookieyes.svg"/></a>

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="sf-input-text" name="_sf_search[]" placeholder="SØK …" title="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="sf-input-text" name="_sf_search[]" placeholder="SØK …" title="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required=
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/> <div> <span style="font-size:14px; margin-top:10px;">
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="wp-singular arrangementer-template-default single single-arrangementer postid-12166 wp-theme-Avada wp-child-theme-Avada-Child-Theme fusion-image-hovers fusion-pagination-sizing fusion-but
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'firstname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'lastname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

Oslo Spektrum i 360° – Oslo Spektrum Arena

https://oslospektrum.no/360-tour/
Avvik: 79 | Bestått: 169
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/cc.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/by.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/sa.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>

Image is missing alt attribute

Image is missing alt attribute

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="sf-input-text" name="_sf_search[]" placeholder="SØK …" title="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/> <input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="wp-singular arrangementer-template-default single single-arrangementer postid-12403 wp-theme-Avada wp-child-theme-Avada-Child-Theme fusion-image-hovers fusion-pagination-sizing fusion-but
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-center fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;font-size:1em;--fontSize:30;line-height:1.6;">The Waterboys – Fisherman’s Blues Revue feat
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="panel-title toggle" id="toggle_266d7d1cb5e0fbb69"><a aria-controls="266d7d1cb5e0fbb69" aria-expanded="false" data-parent="#accordion-12403-1" data-target="#266d7d1cb5e0fbb69" data-toggle="c
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'custom_fields[EXTRA1][]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<a class="wt-cli-element wt-cli-element cli-plugin-main-link" href="https://oslospektrum.no/personvern" id="wt-cli-policy-link" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:600;

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'firstname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'lastname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" ro
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

https://oslospektrum.no/nyhetsbrev/
Avvik: 82 | Bestått: 165
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/cc.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/by.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/sa.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'firstname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'lastname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form

Forside – Oslo Spektrum Arena

https://oslospektrum.no
Avvik: 123 | Bestått: 242
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (21 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-label="Nye Oslo Spektrum" class="fusion-empty-dims-img-placeholder" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%27http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%27%20width%3D%271920%27%

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="home wp-singular page-template page-template-100-width page-template-100-width-php page page-id-4820 wp-theme-Avada wp-child-theme-Avada-Child-Theme fusion-image-hovers fusion-pagination-
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-left fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;--fontSize:26;line-height:1.6;"><a class="awb-custom-text-color awb-custom-text-hover-color"
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'custom_fields[EXTRA1][]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a href="http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1" rel="license noopener noreferrer" style="display:inline-block;" target="_blank">CC BY-SA 4.0<img src="https://mirrors.creativeco
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="wt-cli-element wt-cli-element cli-plugin-main-link" href="https://oslospektrum.no/personvern" id="wt-cli-policy-link" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:600;
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="wt-cli-element wt-cli-element cli-plugin-main-link" href="https://oslospektrum.no/personvern" id="wt-cli-policy-link" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:600;

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="sf-input-text" name="_sf_search[]" placeholder="SØK …" title="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

https://oslospektrum.no/arrangementer/deep-purple/

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)

Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi

2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="wp-singular arrangementer-template-default single single-arrangementer postid-12393 wp-theme-Avada wp-child-theme-Avada-Child-Theme fusion-image-hovers fusion-pagination-sizing fusion-but
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-center fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;font-size:1em;--fontSize:30;line-height:1.6;">Deep Purple</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="panel-title toggle" id="toggle_cb917559e359216eb"><a aria-controls="cb917559e359216eb" aria-expanded="false" data-parent="#accordion-12393-1" data-target="#cb917559e359216eb" data-toggle="c
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'custom_fields[EXTRA1][]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'firstname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'lastname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" ro
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

id="7043"

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

MODERATE

Personvernerklæring – Oslo Spektrum Arena

https://oslospektrum.no/personvern/
Avvik: 77 | Bestått: 158
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/cc.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/by.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/sa.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="widget-title">Vi er på sosiale medier</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'custom_fields[EXTRA1][]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="wt-cli-element cookielawinfo-row-cat-table cookielawinfo-winter"><thead><tr><th class="cookielawinfo-column-1" scope="col">Cookie</th><th class="cookielawinfo-column-3" scope="col">Varig
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="wt-cli-element cookielawinfo-row-cat-table cookielawinfo-winter"><thead><tr><th class="cookielawinfo-column-1" scope="col">Cookie</th><th class="cookielawinfo-column-3" scope="col">Varig

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Kurt Nilsen Julekonsert 2026 – Oslo Spektrum Arena

https://oslospektrum.no/arrangementer/kurt-nilsen-julekonsert-2026/
Avvik: 104 | Bestått: 210
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-label="Kurt Nilsen_Ny nettside" class="fusion-empty-dims-img-placeholder fusion-no-large-visibility fusion-no-medium-visibility" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%27
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="lazyload" data-orig-src="https://oslospektrum.no/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Sittende-Full-sal.png" decoding="async" rel="prettyPhoto" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%27http%3A%2F
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="lazyload" data-orig-src="https://oslospektrum.no/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Sittende-Full-sal.png" decoding="async" rel="prettyPhoto" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%27http%3A%2F

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="wp-singular arrangementer-template-default single single-arrangementer postid-11931 wp-theme-Avada wp-child-theme-Avada-Child-Theme fusion-image-hovers fusion-pagination-sizing fusion-but
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-center fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;font-size:1em;--fontSize:30;line-height:1.6;">Kurt Nilsen Julekonsert 2026</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="panel-title toggle" id="toggle_5061b15cc507fb433"><a aria-controls="5061b15cc507fb433" aria-expanded="false" data-parent="#accordion-11931-1" data-target="#5061b15cc507fb433" data-toggle="c
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

MODERATE

Personal data field 'firstname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

Personal data field 'lastname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (33 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

<a aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-necessary" aria-describedby="wt-cli-tab-necessary" aria-expanded="false" class="cli-nav-link cli-settings-mobile" data-target="necessary" data-toggle="cli-toggle-tab" id="
Add aria-selected attribute to element with role='tab'
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Role 'tab' requires aria-selected attribute

Tips for en god konsertopplevelse – Oslo Spektrum Arena

https://oslospektrum.no/tips-for-en-god-konsertopplevelse/
Avvik: 77 | Bestått: 168
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-label="Konsert" class="fusion-empty-dims-img-placeholder" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%27http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%27%20width%3D%271920%27%20height%3
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/cc.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/by.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/sa.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="widget-title">Vi er på sosiale medier</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'custom_fields[EXTRA1][]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<a href="https://www.cookieyes.com/" target="_blank"><img alt="CookieYes Logo" src="https://oslospektrum.no/wp-content/plugins/webtoffee-gdpr-cookie-consent/public/images/logo-cookieyes.svg"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="sf-input-text" name="_sf_search[]" placeholder="SØK …" title="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/> <input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/> <input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-left fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;font-size:1em;--fontSize:22;--minFontSize:22;line-height:1.18;">Arenaregler for publikum</h3
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'custom_fields[EXTRA1][]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table class="wt-cli-element cookielawinfo-row-cat-table cookielawinfo-winter"><thead><tr><th class="cookielawinfo-column-1" scope="col">Cookie</th><th class="cookielawinfo-column-3" scope="col">Varig
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<a class="wt-cli-element wt-cli-element cli-plugin-main-link" href="https://oslospektrum.no/personvern" id="wt-cli-policy-link" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:600;
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="wt-cli-element wt-cli-element cli-plugin-main-link" href="https://oslospektrum.no/personvern" id="wt-cli-policy-link" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:600;
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.cookieyes.com/" target="_blank"><img alt="CookieYes Logo" src="https://oslospektrum.no/wp-content/plugins/webtoffee-gdpr-cookie-consent/public/images/logo-cookieyes.svg"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'firstname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'lastname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" ro

Mat og drikke – Oslo Spektrum Arena

https://oslospektrum.no/mat-og-drikke/
Avvik: 79 | Bestått: 173
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-label="Servering-Oslo-Spektrum" class="fusion-empty-dims-img-placeholder" decoding="async" src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%27http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%27%20width%3D%2710
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/cc.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/by.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/icons/sa.svg?ref=chooser-v1" style="height:22px!important;margin-left:3px;vertical-align:text-bottom;"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-left fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;--fontSize:20;--minFontSize:20;line-height:1.5;">Mat og drikke i Oslo Spektrum</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'custom_fields[EXTRA1][]' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="sf-input-text" name="_sf_search[]" placeholder="SØK …" title="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/> <input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="sf-input-text" name="_sf_search[]" placeholder="SØK …" title="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"> <input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/> <input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="fusion-title-heading title-heading-left fusion-responsive-typography-calculated" style="margin:0;font-size:1em;--fontSize:22;--minFontSize:22;line-height:1.18;">Arenaregler for publikum</h3
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 id="wt-cli-privacy-title">Tilpass samtykkepreferanser</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

<input name="custom_fields[EXTRA1][]" type="checkbox" value="Familievennlig"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

MODERATE

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

MODERATE

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form

<a class="wt-cli-element wt-cli-element cli-plugin-main-link" href="https://oslospektrum.no/personvern" id="wt-cli-policy-link" style="display:inline-block; text-decoration:underline; font-weight:600;

MODERATE

<a href="https://www.cookieyes.com/" target="_blank"><img alt="CookieYes Logo" src="https://oslospektrum.no/wp-content/plugins/webtoffee-gdpr-cookie-consent/public/images/logo-cookieyes.svg"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a class="fusion-top-top-link" href="#" id="toTop"> <span class="screen-reader-text" id="awb-to-top-label">Gå til toppen</span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'firstname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="firstname" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'lastname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="lastname" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input name="email" placeholder="E-postadresse" required="" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse' missing autocomplete attribute

<input aria-controls="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" aria-label="ytelse" aria-labelledby="wt-cli-tab-link-ytelse" class="cli-user-preference-checkbox" data-id="checkbox-ytelse" id="wt-cli-checkbox-ytelse" ro
Add autocomplete='tel' to help users fill in the form

id="7042"

SERIOUS

id="7043"
